market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This luxury woodland pod offers a private retreat just 2 minutes from the NEC in Birmingham. Sleeps 4 guests in a spacious entire home with modern comforts. While currently booking at a 40% discount versus market rates (£175 median), proximity to the NEC, and the 4.81-star guest rating are strong differentiators. The open 90-day calendar (21.7% booked) suggests pricing and description optimization could help capture demand from event attendees and locals seeking nearby accommodations. Highlights include the secluded woodland setting and convenient location for accessing Birmingham's top attractions. Guests praise the pod's cleanliness and attention to detail despite limited publicly listed amenities.
top_amenity_gaps: On-site parking (listed as missing in market context)
Streaming/wifi-equipped entertainment (implied by 'luxury' but not stated)
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should be the woodland exterior at golden hour to highlight both the luxury aesthetic and proximity to nature—key differentiators in a price-sensitive market.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate (-£70 vs £175 median) is 40% below cohort but occupancy (21.7% booked) trails market average (28.3%) and could improve with better value presentation
Empty amenities section loses 3.6% of £105.4 revenue/night from unaddressed guest expectations about entertainment, outdoor, and parking features
90-day calendar has 70 open nights but title lacks 'NEC' keyword which could improve local SEO visibility for event attendees
analysis.outreach_hook: With rates 40% below market average (£105 vs £175) yet 28.3% occupancy vs your 21.7%, a title/amenity optimization could unlock £7,378 in potential revenue over 70 open nights
